hooks.command: DIR=${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-/Users/craigrobinson/garmin-coach}; B=$(git -C "$DIR" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$B" ] && [ "$B" != "main" ] && [ -z "$(git -C "$DIR" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && [ "$(git -C "$DIR" rev-list @{u}..HEAD --count 2>/dev/null)" = "0" ] && echo 'Branch clean and pushed - run /closeout <batch-id> if ready to close out' || true
